## Summary

<!-- What pages are added, updated, or removed? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Page has a `title` in front matter
- [ ] File name is lowercase with hyphens only
- [ ] Code blocks have language tags
- [ ] Internal links use relative paths
- [ ] `last_update.date` updated if content changed significantly
- [ ] New page added to `sidebars.ts` (if using manual sidebar)
- [ ] Previewed locally with `npm start`
- [ ] `npm run build` completes with no errors (catches broken links)
- [ ] No broken links (`onBrokenLinks: "throw"` enforces this at build time)
